content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — app is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift SecureField/email) and demo credentials are provided (demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt), but notes.txt contains only "n/a" with no explanation of how to reach the subscription paywall (PaywallView.swift) or unlock premium features.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit instructions to reach gated functionality, especially paywalled features like FocusShield's app blocking/schedules/reports — a bare "n/a" note gives no guidance on navigating from login to the paywall or whether purchases can be tested. Please replace notes.txt with concrete steps (e.g. "Sign in, tap Premium tab to view paywall; use sandbox account to test purchase flow") to avoid a rejection for incomplete review information.
